product_overview: A Super Admin frontend for EduHub focused on platform-wide MockBook management: view KPIs, manage test series and categories, and create new test series with scheduling and pricing. Includes authentication and navigation to MockBook-related workflows.
core_goals: Allow Super Admins to authenticate and access the platform dashboard securely.
Provide a consolidated MockBook management workspace to view platform-level KPIs, live tests, and test-series lists.
Enable category management for organizing test series and the Q‑Bank structure.
Support creation of new test series (scheduling, basic configuration) and surface validation and error states.
Ensure smooth navigation between dashboard, MockBook, category management, and test-series creation routes.

features.name: Login
features.description: Authenticate a Super Admin user to gain access to the platform and protected routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See authentication error message

features.name: Super Admin Dashboard
features.description: Entry landing for Super Admins showing platform-level KPIs, high-level metrics and quick navigation to management sections including MockBook.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See platform KPI stats for orgs, MRR, students and tests -> Choose to open MockBook management at /mockbook
Navigate to / -> If not authenticated -> Redirect to /login

features.name: MockBook Management
features.description: Manage platform-wide test series: view KPI stats, filter and browse series, inspect live tests, and navigate to category management or featured series.
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook -> View KPI stats for platform tests, series, attempts, and students -> Filter test series by name, category, and status -> Select a live test to view its details -> Navigate to category management at /mockbook/categories
Navigate to /mockbook -> Apply filter that returns no matches -> See an empty state with suggestions to broaden filters or clear filters

features.name: Category Management
features.description: Create and maintain categories used to organize MockBook test series and the global Q‑Bank folder structure.
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook/categories -> View list of existing categories and counts -> Provide details for a new category -> Save new category -> See the new category in the list
Navigate to /mockbook/categories -> Provide invalid or empty category details -> Attempt to save -> See validation error and guidance to fix input

features.name: Create Test Series
features.description: Create a new MockBook test series with required configuration such as title, scheduling, and basic pricing or visibility settings and save it to the series list.
user_flows: Navigate to /mockbook/test-series/create -> Fill in test series details (title, sections, schedule, visibility) -> Configure scheduling and basic pricing if applicable -> Save test series -> See saved series appear in /mockbook series list
Navigate to /mockbook/test-series/create -> Omit a required field (e.g., title or schedule) -> Attempt to save -> See validation error describing the missing required information

routes.description: MockBook platform management, test series, and analytics

features.name: MockBook Management
features.description: Comprehensive dashboard for managing platform-wide test series, live tests, and pricing.
user_interactions: View KPI stats for platform tests, series, attempts, and students
Filter test series by name, category, and status
Navigate to category management or featured series
